title: Sheet Map
description: Load points from a public Google Sheet and visualize them on a map with clustering. Just paste a URL.

title: Route Finder
description: Find routes and solve TSP across city landmarks. Switch between Yogyakarta and München. Real road distances via pgRouting + Supabase.

title: Daylight Duration
description: How many hours of daylight — or fasting — does each latitude get? Switch between Daylight and Fasting mode (6 Islamic methods + custom), animate through the year, and see polar effects.

title: World Overview
description: A simple world map using OpenStreetMap tiles, rendered with OpenLayers.

title: City Explorer
description: Smooth vector tile map with MapLibre GL JS. Pan and zoom around any city.

title: Earthquake Heatmap
description: Live global earthquake heatmap powered by USGS data. Filter by time period and magnitude, switch between heatmap and dot view.

title: 3D Globe
description: An interactive 3D globe using CesiumJS. Rotate and zoom the entire Earth.
